name: plugin-dev
description: End-to-end Claude Code plugin authoring toolkit. Covers the full plugin lifecycle: ideating a plugin idea, researching the marketplace, designing component architecture (skill vs hook vs MCP vs agent vs command), authoring hooks with all 28 event types, composing multi-component plugins, validating structural correctness, and evaluating activation and output quality. Includes 4 runnable scripts: plugin scaffolder, structural validator, eval harness, and hook tester.
